data.title: In 2028, Vance leads at 19.85% in Polymarket odds amid uproar over DHS finding 278,000 noncitizens on voter rolls.
data.description: In a recent commentary, it was revealed that the Department of Homeland Security has uncovered 278,000 noncitizens on voter rolls. This development has sparked further discussion on election integrity, particularly within the realm of prediction markets. The presence of such a significant number of noncitizens in the voter registration system has brought attention to the need for vigilance in ensuring the legitimacy of elections. This revelation is likely to fuel debates and prompt actions towards enhancing the security and accuracy of electoral processes.
South Korea extends fuel tax reduction through end-September: Yonhap

data.title: Upstart Receives Conditional Approval from the OCC to Establish Upstart Bank
data.description: A financial technology company based in Burlingame, California, Upstart Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPST), known for its artificial intelligence-powered lending platform, revealed that the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has given preliminary consent for the establishment of Upstart Bank, N.A. This move aims to streamline operations, regulations, and financial matters for Upstart and its capital collaborators. The OCC's conditional approval comes subsequent to Upstart's formal submission.
